experience.role: Senior Software Engineer: New Website Platform (NWP) CMS Team
experience.summary_short: Worked on the Wagtail-based CMS powering the new ONS website platform, contributing across backend engineering, search integration, authentication, CI/CD, developer experience, and technical leadership.
highlights: Led and implemented the Wagtail–Kafka search integration, synchronising CMS content updates with the ONS Search Service using event-driven architecture and Kafka messaging.
Developed REST API endpoints using Django REST Framework (DRF) to expose indexable CMS content with pagination and contract-compliant schemas for downstream search services.
Integrated AWS Cognito authentication into Wagtail CMS using JWT-based authentication flows and custom Django middleware.
Led sandbox search integration work, collaborating with OpenSauce developers and producing reusable Confluence testing and integration documentation adopted by multiple teams.
Designed and implemented complex cross-pollination functionality enabling dynamic content surfacing between Topic, Statistical Article, and Methodology pages.
Delivered UX and backend improvements across Wagtail, including redirect logic, validation consistency improvements, and maintainable block refactors.
Diagnosed and resolved CI/CD and Kafka broker integration issues, improving pipeline stability and local developer workflows.
Supported Django upgrades, dependency maintenance, flaky test remediation, hotfixes, and build reliability improvements.
Led knowledge transfer sessions, onboarding support, PR reviews, release activities, and cross-functional collaboration with QA, User Research, BAs, PMs, and infrastructure engineers.

experience.role: Software Engineer: EQ Author (Census) & New Website Platform
experience.summary_short: Contributed to the NWP Content Management System and the EQ Author census platform, spanning Python, Django, Wagtail, React, and Node.js across two engineering teams.
highlights: Co-led the Taxonomy and UI Testing Suite initiatives using Behave and Playwright, driving improvements across multiple engineering workstreams.
Led development of the Main Menu and Footer Menu systems within Wagtail CMS, including custom validation functionality and pair programming with placement students.
Led UX-focused improvements within the Wagtail admin experience based on user research findings.
Enhanced authentication resilience by implementing timeout functionality within custom authentication flows on EQ Author.
Led a UX improvement SPIKE for the EQ Survey Creation Tool extractor, analysing workflows and proposing design-led technical improvements.
Selected by the technical lead to lead the Python Flask component of a new service initiative.

experience.role: Junior Software Engineer: Statistical Methods Library Team
experience.summary_short: Worked across multiple teams within ONS, contributing to large-scale government applications and internal platforms.
highlights: Led a proof of concept integrating a headless CMS into the Statistical Methods Library platform, later refined for production deployment.
Collaborated with tech leads, architects, stakeholders, and steering groups on system design, security, scalability, and delivery decisions.
Built and improved automated testing pipelines using Selenium, Behave, Pytest, and CI/CD tooling, reducing execution times through pipeline parallelisation.
Supported non-functional testing initiatives including performance, accessibility, load, stress, and security testing.
Mentored placement students and supported developer onboarding and knowledge transfer across teams.

experience.summary_short: Early industry exposure building a sanctions screening application using fuzzy logic, alongside Agile, cybersecurity, and UX workshops.
highlights: Worked on a programming project utilising fuzzy logic to develop a sanctions screening application.
Attended technical sessions gaining exposure to Agile methodologies, cybersecurity within FinTech, and UX design principles.

experience.summary_short: Gained hands-on experience working with large-scale government databases, verifying and uploading immigration documentation with accuracy and data integrity.
highlights: Verified and uploaded immigration documentation, ensuring records were processed accurately and securely.
Cross-referenced physical immigration documents against internal system records to maintain data accuracy and integrity.

bonus_skills.description: Active board member involved in recruitment, role-profile reviews, and career-progression framework updates.

bonus_skills.title: Talks, hackathons & community sessions
bonus_skills.description: Organised community talks, hackathons, newsletters, and technical exchange sessions. Delivered a talk on headless content management systems.

bonus_skills.label: Leadership
bonus_skills.title: Community Tech Exchange Team
bonus_skills.description: Led the initiative to form the team, working directly with the Head of Profession and Innovation Team. Delivered 7+ community sessions for Python and JS.

bonus_skills.label: Standards
bonus_skills.title: Technical Advisory Group (TAG)
bonus_skills.description: Contributed to the creation and review of software-engineering principles and standards to align practices across ONS.

bonus_skills.label: Outreach
bonus_skills.title: Outreach Ambassador
bonus_skills.description: Promoted ONS programmes such as Year-in-Industry and Apprenticeships. Delivered onboarding sessions, presentations, and Q&A panels for new placement students.

bonus_skills.label: Mentoring
bonus_skills.title: Student mentoring & leadership
bonus_skills.description: Mentored 4+ students, supporting their technical growth across teams and disciplines.

bonus_skills.label: Engagement
bonus_skills.title: Show-and-tells & workshops
bonus_skills.description: Regularly presented at internal and external show-and-tells, dev meetings, and product away-days. Brought in guest speakers and contributed Loom guides for QATs, researchers, and PMs.

bonus_skills.label: Process
bonus_skills.title: Documentation & templates
bonus_skills.description: Authored template repositories, documentation standards, and technical guides. Created and refined tech-debt tickets to improve backlog hygiene.

bonus_skills.label: Strategy
bonus_skills.title: Strategic initiatives
bonus_skills.description: Participated in CPD Log Pilot, GDD Pay Framework, and career-progression reviews. Initiated discussions on engineering best practices within tech sessions.

bonus_skills.label: Collaboration
bonus_skills.title: Cross-functional collaboration
bonus_skills.description: Worked closely with QATs, user researchers, DMs, TLs, BAs, and PMs to triage and refine cards for key releases; provided support during resourcing gaps.

bonus_skills.label: Post-release
bonus_skills.title: Post-release investigations
bonus_skills.description: Led investigation and documentation of post-Day-1 features such as live production data sync and audit logging, facilitating workshops and recording findings on Confluence.

projects.title: IMAX Sentinel
projects.description: A BFI IMAX screening watcher that monitors Christopher Nolan film listings and sends Telegram alerts when tickets appear. Uses Camoufox to bypass Cloudflare detection.

projects.title: Newsletter Sentinel
projects.description: A personal pipeline that fetches newsletters from Gmail, deduplicates stories using Jaccard similarity, and generates AI-powered daily digests via Claude.

projects.title: SignSense
projects.description: An AI-powered sign language recognition and learning application using an LSTM neural network and MediaPipe hand tracking to detect and classify gestures in real-time via webcam.

projects.title: BinSense
projects.description: A smart waste management system using IoT sensors to monitor bin fill levels in real-time, with dynamic route optimisation to reduce collection costs and carbon emissions.

projects.title: Portfolio & Blog
projects.description: This site - a static portfolio and blog built with Pelican, Jinja2 and Tailwind CSS. Deployed to Vercel with GitHub Actions CI.

projects.title: Scrabble
projects.description: A fully playable browser-based Scrabble game with multiple board designs, letter scoring, double/triple word and letter squares, valid word checking, and connection validation.

projects.title: Wordle
projects.description: A browser-based of the viral word game Wordle, rebuilt from scratch with all the core game logic and features of the original.

projects.title: QJet
projects.description: A desktop airline booking and management system with role-based access for customers, staff, and admins. Features flight booking, cancellations, email-based password resets, and admin analytics dashboards exportable to Excel.
